description: Karaite betrothal document. Date: 16 Tishrei 5445 AM (1684 CE). Location: Cairo. The previously unmarried bride is Hana bt. Moshe b. Shalom ha-Levi and the groom Yeshūʿa b. Shelomo b. Shmuel ha-Levi. The groom's contributions toward the marriage are listed as: 50 kesif + 1260 medin + 200 medin + 800 medin. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
